name: Hacker News Daily Digest
description: Get a daily digest of top Hacker News stories and discussions

agents.name: HN Fetcher
agents.purpose: Fetch top stories from Hacker News
agents.system_prompt_hint: Fetch the top 30 stories from Hacker News API. Get titles, scores, comment counts, and URLs.

agents.name: HN Summarizer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a digest grouped by category (tech, startups, science, etc). Include story titles, brief descriptions, and links.

suggestion_card.title: HN Digest
suggestion_card.subtitle: Top Hacker News stories daily
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Get me today's top Hacker News stories

author: agentfactory
